summary: Phase 3 Testing Complete: Export All Session Logs + Pending Banner + Inbox Badge. All 10 backend tests PASSED, all 13 frontend UI tests PASSED. All requested features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/portal/sync-logs/export?client_id=X exports all logs for client as CSV - WORKING
Export endpoint correctly sets Content-Disposition with '_all' suffix for all logs export
Export endpoint correctly sets Content-Type: text/csv
Frontend Raw Logs tab shows 'Export All Logs' button with data-testid='export-all-session-logs' - WORKING
Frontend Inbox tab shows red badge (span.bg-red-500) with pending count when data exists - WORKING
Frontend pending banner with data-testid='pending-forward-banner' appears on Raw Logs and Batches tabs - WORKING
Frontend banner has 'Go to Inbox' button with data-testid='banner-go-to-inbox' - WORKING
Frontend Inbox tab shows 'Forward All to Variance' button with data-testid='forward-to-variance-btn' - WORKING
seed_data_creation: Created test sync data via POST /api/sync/ with TEST_Export_Device and TEST_Banner_Device
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 (Export All + Banner + Badge) is complete. Key features: 1) GET /api/portal/sync-logs/export?client_id=X&session_id=Y exports CSV (session_id optional), 2) Inbox tab shows red badge with pending count when not on inbox tab, 3) Pending forward banner appears on Raw Logs and Batches tabs when pending data exists, 4) Banner has 'Go to Inbox' button that switches tab, 5) Forward All to Variance button shows on Inbox tab when pending data exists. Test data: Client=0a2045d2-dc5f-4f6b-b622-8c2a67788b8d, Session=8bb1ee6a-a3b3-48ee-b6a2-023fede4382d

test_classes: TestExportAllLogsEndpoint (5 tests) - requires client_id, client_id only, session filter, date filter, nonexistent client 404
TestInboxBadgeCount (2 tests) - returns pending count, returns scanner details
TestForwardToVarianceButton (1 test) - endpoint exists and responds
TestSyncToCreatePendingData (1 test) - sync creates pending inbox data

7_raw_logs_tab: PASS - Switched to Raw Logs tab
8_export_all_button: PASS - 'Export All Logs' button visible with data-testid='export-all-session-logs'
9_pending_banner_raw_logs: PASS - Pending banner visible on Raw Logs tab
10_go_to_inbox_button: PASS - 'Go to Inbox' button present in banner
11_batches_tab_banner: PASS - Pending banner also visible on Batches tab
13_forward_button: PASS - 'Forward All to Variance (1 locations from 1 scanner)' button visible

features_verified.backend_export_all_logs: PASS - GET /api/portal/sync-logs/export?client_id=X returns CSV with all logs
features_verified.backend_inbox_summary: PASS - Returns total_pending and scanner_count for badge/banner
features_verified.frontend_export_all_button: PASS - data-testid='export-all-session-logs' visible on Raw Logs tab
features_verified.frontend_inbox_badge: PASS - Red badge (span.bg-red-500) shows pending count
features_verified.frontend_pending_banner_raw_logs: PASS - data-testid='pending-forward-banner' on Raw Logs tab
